name: creates the student table
probe: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name;

name: student_id is the primary key
probe: SELECT name FROM pragma_table_info('student') WHERE pk > 0 ORDER BY pk;

name: name is NOT NULL
probe: SELECT name FROM pragma_table_info('student') WHERE "notnull" = 1 ORDER BY name;

name: major defaults to 'undecided'
probe: SELECT name, dflt_value FROM pragma_table_info('student') WHERE dflt_value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY name;
